summary: Iteration 6: Backend refactoring and Student Records module testing. Backend: 30/30 tests passed (1 minor test script fix for VAPID key name). All existing endpoints work after refactoring to modular routers. New Student Records module fully functional with CRUD, grades, attendance, assignments, discipline, transcript, stats, and bulk attendance. Frontend: StudentRecords page loads correctly, student list displays with search/filter, detail view shows tabs and stats, all interactive elements working.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring is clean - server.py is now a slim entry point with router includes
Student Records module properly implements all CRUD operations with team-based filtering
GPA recalculation works correctly when grades are added/deleted
Frontend StudentRecords.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for testing
All API endpoints properly handle authentication and authorization

success_rate.frontend: 100% - StudentRecords page loads, student list displays, detail view with tabs works

backend_refactoring.auth_endpoints: Login, register, me, change-password all working ✓

student_records_crud.delete_student: DELETE /api/students/{id} removes student and related records ✓

student_grades.add_grade: POST /api/students/{id}/grades adds grade and recalculates GPA ✓
student_grades.delete_grade: DELETE /api/students/{id}/grades/{grade_id} removes grade and recalculates GPA ✓
student_grades.gpa_calculation: GPA correctly calculated using grade points and credit hours ✓

student_transcript.get_transcript: GET /api/students/{id}/transcript returns grouped by semester with GPA ✓

student_stats.get_stats: GET /api/students/{id}/stats returns aggregated attendance, assignments, discipline stats ✓

bulk_attendance.bulk_add: POST /api/students/attendance/bulk adds multiple records at once ✓

frontend_student_records.student_list: Shows student list with search and filter ✓
frontend_student_records.add_student_button: Add Student button visible and clickable ✓
frontend_student_records.student_row_click: Clicking student row opens detail view ✓
frontend_student_records.detail_view_tabs: Detail view shows Grades, Attendance, Assignments, Discipline, Transcript tabs ✓
frontend_student_records.stats_cards: Stats cards show GPA, Attendance %, Assignments, Discipline counts ✓
frontend_student_records.existing_grade: John Smith shows Math grade (A) in Grades tab ✓
frontend_student_records.back_button: Back button returns to student list ✓

seed_data_creation: Test student 'John Smith' (STU001) exists with one Math grade (A, Fall 2025) and one attendance record
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6: Backend refactored from monolithic server.py to modular routers (auth.py, entities.py, functions.py, messages.py, upload.py, llm.py, students.py). Student Records module is brand new with full CRUD for students, grades, attendance, assignments, discipline. GPA auto-recalculates on grade add/delete. Frontend StudentRecords.jsx works with proper data-testid attributes. Test student John Smith exists with GPA 4.0.
